metadata.significance: Named after Mary, mother of Jesus, emphasizes prophetic lineage

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ كٓهيعٓصٓ
ayahs.transliteration: KafhayaAAaynsad

translations.en_sahih: Kaf, Ha, Ya, 'Ayn, Sad.
translations.en_yusufali: Kaf. Ha. Ya. 'Ain. Sad.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kaaf, Haa, Yaa, Ain, Saad

ayahs.arabic: ذِكْرُ رَحْمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَبْدَهُۥ زَكَرِيَّآ
ayahs.transliteration: Thikru rahmati rabbika AAabdahu zakariyya

translations.en_sahih: [This is] a mention of the mercy of your Lord to His servant Zechariah
translations.en_yusufali: (This is) a recital of the Mercy of thy Lord to His servant Zakariya.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ini ialah) perihal limpahan rahmat Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad), kepada hambaNya Zakaria.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ نِدَآءً خَفِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ith nada rabbahu nidaan khafiyyan

translations.en_sahih: When he called to his Lord a private supplication.
translations.en_yusufali: Behold! he cried to his Lord in secret,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ingatkanlah peristiwa) ketika Nabi Zakaria berdoa kepada tuhannya dengan doa permohonan secara perlahan.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى وَهَنَ ٱلْعَظْمُ مِنِّى وَٱشْتَعَلَ ٱلرَّأْسُ شَيْبًا وَلَمْ أَكُنۢ بِدُعَآئِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi innee wahana alAAathmu minnee waishtaAAala alrrasu shayban walam akun biduAAaika rabbi shaqiyyan

translations.en_sahih: He said, "My Lord, indeed my bones have weakened, and my head has filled with white, and never have I been in my supplication to You, my Lord, unhappy.
translations.en_yusufali: Praying: "O my Lord! infirm indeed are my bones, and the hair of my head doth glisten with grey: but never am I unblest, O my Lord, in my prayer to Thee!
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia merayu dengan berkata: Wahai Tuhanku! Sesungguhnya telah lemahlah tulang -tulangku, dan telah putih melepaklah uban kepalaku; dan aku - wahai Tuhanku - tidak pernah merasa hampa dengan doa permohonanku kepadaMu.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنِّى خِفْتُ ٱلْمَوَٰلِىَ مِن وَرَآءِى وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا فَهَبْ لِى مِن لَّدُنكَ وَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wainnee khiftu almawaliya min waraee wakanati imraatee AAaqiran fahab lee min ladunka waliyyan

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, I fear the successors after me, and my wife has been barren, so give me from Yourself an heir
translations.en_yusufali: "Now I fear (what) my relatives (and colleagues) (will do) after me: but my wife is barren: so give me an heir as from Thyself,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya aku merasa bimbang akan kecuaian kaum kerabatku menyempurnakan tugas-tugas ugama sepeninggalanku; dan isteriku pula adalah seorang yang mandul; oleh itu, kurniakanlah daku dari sisiMu seorang anak lelaki.

ayahs.arabic: يَرِثُنِى وَيَرِثُ مِنْ ءَالِ يَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَٱجْعَلْهُ رَبِّ رَضِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Yarithunee wayarithu min ali yaAAqooba waijAAalhu rabbi radiyyan

translations.en_sahih: Who will inherit me and inherit from the family of Jacob. And make him, my Lord, pleasing [to You]."
translations.en_yusufali: "(One that) will (truly) represent me, and represent the posterity of Jacob; and make him, O my Lord! one with whom Thou art well-pleased!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang layak mewarisi daku, juga mewarisi keluarga Nabi Yaakub; dan jadikanlah dia - wahai Tuhanku seorang yang diredhai serta disukai".

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰزَكَرِيَّآ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ ٱسْمُهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ لَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مِن قَبْلُ سَمِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya zakariyya inna nubashshiruka bighulamin ismuhu yahya lam najAAal lahu min qablu samiyyan

translations.en_sahih: [He was told], "O Zechariah, indeed We give you good tidings of a boy whose name will be John. We have not assigned to any before [this] name."
translations.en_yusufali: (His prayer was answered): "O Zakariya! We give thee good news of a son: His name shall be Yahya: on none by that name have We conferred distinction before."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Nabi Zakaria diseru setelah dikabulkan doanya):"Wahai Zakaria! Sesungguhnya Kami memberikan khabar yang mengembirakanmu dengan mengurniakan seorang anak lelaki bernama Yahya, yang kami tidak pernah jadikan sebelum itu, seorangpun yang senama dengannya".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَكَانَتِ ٱمْرَأَتِى عَاقِرًا وَقَدْ بَلَغْتُ مِنَ ٱلْكِبَرِ عِتِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi anna yakoonu lee ghulamun wakanati imraatee AAaqiran waqad balaghtu mina alkibari AAitiyyan

translations.en_sahih: He said, "My Lord, how will I have a boy when my wife has been barren and I have reached extreme old age?"
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "O my Lord! How shall I have a son, when my wife is barren and I have grown quite decrepit from old age?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Zakaria bertanya: "Wahai Tuhanku! Bagaimanakah caranya aku akan beroleh seorang anak, sedang isteriku adalah seorang yang mandul dan aku sendiri pula telah sampai had umur yang setua-tuanya?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَقَدْ خَلَقْتُكَ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ تَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kathalika qala rabbuka huwa AAalayya hayyinun waqad khalaqtuka min qablu walam taku shayan

translations.en_sahih: [An angel] said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, for I created you before, while you were nothing.' "
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "So (it will be) thy Lord saith, 'that is easy for Me: I did indeed create thee before, when thou hadst been nothing!'"
translations.ms_basmeih: Penyeru itu menjawab: Demikian keadaannya - janganlah dihairankan; Tuhanmu berfirman; "Hal itu mudah bagiKu kerana sesungguhnya Aku telah menciptakanmu dahulu, sedang engkau pada masa itu belum ada sebarang apapun."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱجْعَل لِّىٓ ءَايَةً ۚ قَالَ ءَايَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ ٱلنَّاسَ ثَلَـٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi ijAAal lee ayatan qala ayatuka alla tukallima alnnasa thalatha layalin sawiyyan

translations.en_sahih: [Zechariah] said, "My Lord, make for me a sign." He said, "Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound."
translations.en_yusufali: (Zakariya) said: "O my Lord! give me a Sign." "Thy Sign," was the answer, "Shall be that thou shalt speak to no man for three nights, although thou art not dumb."
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Zakaria merayu lagi: "Wahai Tuhanku! Jadikanlah satu tanda bagiku (yang menunjukkan isteriku mengandung)", Allah Taala berfirman: " Tandamu itu ialah engkau tidak akan dapat berkata-kata dengan orang ramai selama tiga malam, sedang engkau dalam keadaan sihat".

ayahs.arabic: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُوا۟ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fakharaja AAala qawmihi mina almihrabi faawha ilayhim an sabbihoo bukratan waAAashiyyan

translations.en_sahih: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allah] in the morning and afternoon.
translations.en_yusufali: So Zakariya came out to his people from him chamber: He told them by signs to celebrate Allah's praises in the morning and in the evening.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka dia pun keluar mendapatkan kaumnya dari Mihrab (tempat sembahyangnya), lalu ia memberi isyarat kepada mereka: "Hendaklah kamu bertasbih (mengerjakan ibadat kepada Allah) pagi dan petang".

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰيَحْيَىٰ خُذِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ بِقُوَّةٍ ۖ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْحُكْمَ صَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya yahya khuthi alkitaba biquwwatin waataynahu alhukma sabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: [Allah] said, "O John, take the Scripture with determination." And We gave him judgement [while yet] a boy
translations.en_yusufali: (To his son came the command): "O Yahya! take hold of the Book with might": and We gave him Wisdom even as a youth,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Wahai Yahya, terimalah Kitab itu (serta amalkanlah) dengan bersungguh-sungguh! Dan Kami berikan kepadanya Hikmat kebijaksanaan semasa ia masih kanak-kanak.

ayahs.arabic: وَحَنَانًا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَوٰةً ۖ وَكَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wahananan min ladunna wazakatan wakana taqiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allah
translations.en_yusufali: And piety (for all creatures) as from Us, and purity: He was devout,
translations.ms_basmeih: dan (Kami mengurniakannya) rahmat dari sisi Kami, serta kelebihan yang kembang manfaatnya; dan ia seorang yang bertaqwa.

ayahs.arabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوَٰلِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wabarran biwalidayhi walam yakun jabbaran AAasiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.
translations.en_yusufali: And kind to his parents, and he was not overbearing or rebellious.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan ia taat serta berbuat baik kepada ibu bapanya, dan ia pula tidak sombong angkuh atau derhaka.

ayahs.arabic: وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wasalamun AAalayhi yawma wulida wayawma yamootu wayawma yubAAathu hayyan

translations.en_sahih: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.
translations.en_yusufali: So Peace on him the day he was born, the day that he dies, and the day that he will be raised up to life (again)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (Kami limpahkan) kepadanya selamat sejahtera pada hari ia diperanakkan, dan pada hari ia mati, serta pada hari ia dibangkitkan hidup semula (pada hari kiamat).

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ ٱنتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Waothkur fee alkitabi maryama ithi intabathat min ahliha makanan sharqiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And mention, [O Muhammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.
translations.en_yusufali: Relate in the Book (the story of) Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place in the East.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bacakanlah (wahai Muhammad) di dalam Kitab Al-Quran ini perihal Maryam, ketika dia memencilkan diri dari keluarganya di sebuah tempat sebelah timur.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Faittakhathat min doonihim hijaban faarsalna ilayha roohana fatamaththala laha basharan sawiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel, and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.
translations.en_yusufali: She placed a screen (to screen herself) from them; then We sent her our angel, and he appeared before her as a man in all respects.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Maryam membuat dinding untuk melindungi dirinya dari mereka maka Kami hantarkan kepadanya: Roh dari kami lalu ia menyamar diri kepadanya sebagai seorang lelaki yang sempurna bentuk kejadiannya.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qalat innee aAAoothu bialrrahmani minka in kunta taqiyyan

translations.en_sahih: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allah."
translations.en_yusufali: She said: "I seek refuge from thee to (Allah) Most Gracious: (come not near) if thou dost fear Allah."
translations.ms_basmeih: Maryam berkata: Sesungguhnya aku berlindung kepada (Allah) Ar-Rahman daripada (gangguan) mu kalaulah engkau seorang yang bertaqwa.

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلَـٰمًا زَكِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala innama ana rasoolu rabbiki liahaba laki ghulaman zakiyyan

translations.en_sahih: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy."
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "Nay, I am only a messenger from thy Lord, (to announce) to thee the gift of a holy son.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia berkata: "Sesungguhnya aku pesuruh Tuhanmu, untuk menyebabkanmu dikurniakan seorang anak yang suci".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qalat anna yakoonu lee ghulamun walam yamsasnee basharun walam aku baghiyyan

translations.en_sahih: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"
translations.en_yusufali: She said: "How shall I have a son, seeing that no man has touched me, and I am not unchaste?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Maryam bertanya (dengan cemas): Bagaimanakah aku akan beroleh seorang anak lelaki, padahal aku tidak pernah disentuh oleh seorang lelaki pun, dan aku pula bukan perempuan jahat?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ ۖ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا ۚ وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala kathaliki qala rabbuki huwa AAalayya hayyinun walinajAAalahu ayatan lilnnasi warahmatan minna wakana amran maqdiyyan

translations.en_sahih: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.' "
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "So (it will be): Thy Lord saith, 'that is easy for Me: and (We wish) to appoint him as a Sign unto men and a Mercy from Us': It is a matter (so) decreed."
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia menjawab: "Demikianlah keadaannya tak usahlah dihairankan; Tuhanmu berfirman: Hal itu mudah bagiKu; dan Kami hendak menjadikan pemberian anak itu sebagai satu tanda (yang membuktikan kekuasaan Kami) untuk umat manusia dan sebagai satu rahmat dari Kami; dan hal itu adalah satu perkara yang telah ditetapkan berlakunya.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ فَحَمَلَتْهُ فَٱنتَبَذَتْ بِهِۦ مَكَانًا قَصِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fahamalathu faintabathat bihi makanan qasiyyan

translations.en_sahih: So she conceived him, and she withdrew with him to a remote place.
translations.en_yusufali: So she conceived him, and she retired with him to a remote place.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Maryam hamilah mengandungnya, lalu ia memencilkan diri dengan kandungannya itu ke sebuah tempat yang jauh.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَجَآءَهَا ٱلْمَخَاضُ إِلَىٰ جِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ قَالَتْ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى مِتُّ قَبْلَ هَـٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسْيًا مَّنسِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Faajaaha almakhadu ila jithAAi alnnakhlati qalat ya laytanee mittu qabla hatha wakuntu nasyan mansiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And the pains of childbirth drove her to the trunk of a palm tree. She said, "Oh, I wish I had died before this and was in oblivion, forgotten."
translations.en_yusufali: And the pains of childbirth drove her to the trunk of a palm-tree: She cried (in her anguish): "Ah! would that I had died before this! would that I had been a thing forgotten and out of sight!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ketika ia hendak bersalin) maka sakit beranak itu memaksanya (pergi bersandar) ke pangkal sebatang pohon tamar (kurma); ia berkata alangkah baiknya kalau aku mati sebelum ini dan menjadilah aku sesuatu yang dilupakan orang dan tidak dikenang-kenang!

ayahs.arabic: فَنَادَىٰهَا مِن تَحْتِهَآ أَلَّا تَحْزَنِى قَدْ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحْتَكِ سَرِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fanadaha min tahtiha alla tahzanee qad jaAAala rabbuki tahtaki sariyyan

translations.en_sahih: But he called her from below her, "Do not grieve; your Lord has provided beneath you a stream.
translations.en_yusufali: But (a voice) cried to her from beneath the (palm-tree): "Grieve not! for thy Lord hath provided a rivulet beneath thee;
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu ia diseru dari sebelah bawahnya:" Janganlah engkau berdukacita (wahai Maryam), sesungguhnya Tuhanmu telah menjadikan di bawahmu sebatang anak sungai.

ayahs.arabic: وَهُزِّىٓ إِلَيْكِ بِجِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ تُسَـٰقِطْ عَلَيْكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wahuzzee ilayki bijithAAi alnnakhlati tusaqit AAalayki rutaban janiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And shake toward you the trunk of the palm tree; it will drop upon you ripe, fresh dates.
translations.en_yusufali: "And shake towards thyself the trunk of the palm-tree: It will let fall fresh ripe dates upon thee.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan gegarlah ke arahmu batang pohon tamar itu, supaya gugur kepadamu buah tamar yang masak.

ayahs.arabic: فَكُلِى وَٱشْرَبِى وَقَرِّى عَيْنًا ۖ فَإِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ ٱلْبَشَرِ أَحَدًا فَقُولِىٓ إِنِّى نَذَرْتُ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ صَوْمًا فَلَنْ أُكَلِّمَ ٱلْيَوْمَ إِنسِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fakulee waishrabee waqarree AAaynan faimma tarayinna mina albashari ahadan faqoolee innee nathartu lilrrahmani sawman falan okallima alyawma insiyyan

translations.en_sahih: So eat and drink and be contented. And if you see from among humanity anyone, say, 'Indeed, I have vowed to the Most Merciful abstention, so I will not speak today to [any] man.' "
translations.en_yusufali: "So eat and drink and cool (thine) eye. And if thou dost see any man, say, 'I have vowed a fast to (Allah) Most Gracious, and this day will I enter into not talk with any human being'"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Maka makanlah dan minumlah serta bertenanglah hati dari segala yang merunsingkan. Kemudian kalau engkau melihat seseorang manusia, maka katakanlah: Sesungguhnya aku bernazar diam membisu kerana (Allah) Ar-Rahman; (setelah aku menyatakan yang demikian) maka aku tidak akan berkata-kata kepada sesiapapun dari kalangan manusia pada hari ini".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَتَتْ بِهِۦ قَوْمَهَا تَحْمِلُهُۥ ۖ قَالُوا۟ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ لَقَدْ جِئْتِ شَيْـًٔا فَرِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Faatat bihi qawmaha tahmiluhu qaloo ya maryamu laqad jiti shayan fariyyan

translations.en_sahih: Then she brought him to her people, carrying him. They said, "O Mary, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented.
translations.en_yusufali: At length she brought the (babe) to her people, carrying him (in her arms). They said: "O Mary! truly an amazing thing hast thou brought!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian baliklah ia kepada kaumnya dengan mendokong anaknya mereka pun menempelaknya dengan berkata: Wahai Maryam! Sesungguhnya engkau telah melakukan suatu perkara yang besar salahnya!

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأُخْتَ هَـٰرُونَ مَا كَانَ أَبُوكِ ٱمْرَأَ سَوْءٍ وَمَا كَانَتْ أُمُّكِ بَغِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya okhta haroona ma kana abooki imraa sawin wama kanat ommuki baghiyyan

translations.en_sahih: O sister of Aaron, your father was not a man of evil, nor was your mother unchaste."
translations.en_yusufali: "O sister of Aaron! Thy father was not a man of evil, nor thy mother a woman unchaste!"
translations.ms_basmeih: " Wahai saudara perempuan Harun, bapamu bukanlah seorang yang buruk akhlaknya, dan ibumu pula bukanlah seorang perempuan jahat!"

ayahs.arabic: فَأَشَارَتْ إِلَيْهِ ۖ قَالُوا۟ كَيْفَ نُكَلِّمُ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلْمَهْدِ صَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Faasharat ilayhi qaloo kayfa nukallimu man kana fee almahdi sabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: So she pointed to him. They said, "How can we speak to one who is in the cradle a child?"
translations.en_yusufali: But she pointed to the babe. They said: "How can we talk to one who is a child in the cradle?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Maryam segera menunjuk kepada anaknya. Mereka berkata (dengan hairannya): "Bagaimana kami boleh berkata-kata dengan seorang yang masih kanak-kanak dalam buaian?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ إِنِّى عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ ءَاتَىٰنِىَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِى نَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala innee AAabdu Allahi ataniya alkitaba wajaAAalanee nabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: [Jesus] said, "Indeed, I am the servant of Allah. He has given me the Scripture and made me a prophet.
translations.en_yusufali: He said: "I am indeed a servant of Allah: He hath given me revelation and made me a prophet;
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia menjawab:" Sesungguhnya aku ini hamba Allah; Ia telah memberikan kepadaku Kitab (Injil), dan Ia telah menjadikan daku seorang Nabi.

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلَنِى مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَـٰنِى بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAalanee mubarakan ayna ma kuntu waawsanee bialssalati waalzzakati ma dumtu hayyan

translations.en_sahih: And He has made me blessed wherever I am and has enjoined upon me prayer and zakah as long as I remain alive
translations.en_yusufali: "And He hath made me blessed wheresoever I be, and hath enjoined on me Prayer and Charity as long as I live;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Ia menjadikan daku seorang yang berkat di mana sahaja aku berada, dan diperintahkan daku mengerjakan sembahyang dan memberi zakat selagi aku hidup.

ayahs.arabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوَٰلِدَتِى وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِى جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wabarran biwalidatee walam yajAAalnee jabbaran shaqiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And [made me] dutiful to my mother, and He has not made me a wretched tyrant.
translations.en_yusufali: "(He) hath made me kind to my mother, and not overbearing or miserable;
translations.ms_basmeih: " Serta (diperintahkan daku) taat dan berbuat baik kepada ibuku, dan Ia tidak menjadikan daku seorang yang sombong takbur atau derhaka.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلسَّلَـٰمُ عَلَىَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدتُّ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Waalssalamu AAalayya yawma wulidtu wayawma amootu wayawma obAAathu hayyan

translations.en_sahih: And peace is on me the day I was born and the day I will die and the day I am raised alive."
translations.en_yusufali: "So peace is on me the day I was born, the day that I die, and the day that I shall be raised up to life (again)"!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan segala keselamatan serta kesejahteraan dilimpahkan kepadaku pada hari aku diperanakkan dan pada hari aku mati, serta pada hari aku dibangkitkan hidup semula (pada hari kiamat)".

ayahs.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ ۚ قَوْلَ ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thalika AAeesa ibnu maryama qawla alhaqqi allathee feehi yamtaroona

translations.en_sahih: That is Jesus, the son of Mary - the word of truth about which they are in dispute.
translations.en_yusufali: Such (was) Jesus the son of Mary: (it is) a statement of truth, about which they (vainly) dispute.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang demikian sifat-sifatnya itulah Isa Ibni Maryam. Keterangan yang tersebut ialah keterangan yang sebenar-benarnya, yang mereka ragu-ragu dan berselisihan padanya.

ayahs.arabic: مَا كَانَ لِلَّهِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ مِن وَلَدٍ ۖ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥٓ ۚ إِذَا قَضَىٰٓ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّمَا يَقُولُ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma kana lillahi an yattakhitha min waladin subhanahu itha qada amran fainnama yaqoolu lahu kun fayakoonu

translations.en_sahih: It is not [befitting] for Allah to take a son; exalted is He! When He decrees an affair, He only says to it, "Be," and it is.
translations.en_yusufali: It is not befitting to (the majesty of) Allah that He should beget a son. Glory be to Him! when He determines a matter, He only says to it, "Be", and it is.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tiadalah layak bagi Allah mempunyai anak. Maha Sucilah Ia. Apabila menetapkan jadinya sesuatu perkara, maka hanyalah Ia berfirman kepadanya: "Jadilah engkau", lalu menjadilah ia.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَبِّى وَرَبُّكُمْ فَٱعْبُدُوهُ ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna Allaha rabbee warabbukum faoAAbudoohu hatha siratun mustaqeemun

translations.en_sahih: [Jesus said], "And indeed, Allah is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. That is a straight path."
translations.en_yusufali: Verily Allah is my Lord and your Lord: Him therefore serve ye: this is a Way that is straight.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya Allah ialah Tuhanku dan Tuhan kamu maka sembahlah kamu akan Dia inilah jalan yang betul - lurus ".

ayahs.arabic: فَٱخْتَلَفَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ مِنۢ بَيْنِهِمْ ۖ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن مَّشْهَدِ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Faikhtalafa alahzabu min baynihim fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min mashhadi yawmin AAatheemin

translations.en_sahih: Then the factions differed [concerning Jesus] from among them, so woe to those who disbelieved - from the scene of a tremendous Day.
translations.en_yusufali: But the sects differ among themselves: and woe to the unbelievers because of the (coming) Judgment of a Momentous Day!
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, golongan-golongan (dari kaumnya) itu berselisihan sesama sendiri. Maka kecelakaanlah bagi orang-orang kafir (yang berselisihan) itu, dari apa yang disaksikan pada hari yang besar huru-haranya.

ayahs.arabic: أَسْمِعْ بِهِمْ وَأَبْصِرْ يَوْمَ يَأْتُونَنَا ۖ لَـٰكِنِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: AsmiAA bihim waabsir yawma yatoonana lakini alththalimoona alyawma fee dalalin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: How [clearly] they will hear and see the Day they come to Us, but the wrongdoers today are in clear error.
translations.en_yusufali: How plainly will they see and hear, the Day that they will appear before Us! but the unjust today are in error manifest!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sungguh jelas pendengaran dan penglihatan mereka yang kafir itu semasa mereka datang mengadap Kami pada hari akhirat. Tetapi orang-orang yang zalim (dengan perbuatan kufur dan maksiat) pada masa di dunia ini, berada dalam kesesatan yang nyata

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْحَسْرَةِ إِذْ قُضِىَ ٱلْأَمْرُ وَهُمْ فِى غَفْلَةٍ وَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waanthirhum yawma alhasrati ith qudiya alamru wahum fee ghaflatin wahum la yuminoona

translations.en_sahih: And warn them, [O Muhammad], of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be concluded; and [yet], they are in [a state of] heedlessness, and they do not believe.
translations.en_yusufali: But warn them of the Day of Distress, when the matter will be determined: for (behold,) they are negligent and they do not believe!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berilah amaran (wahai Muhammad) kepada umat manusia seluruhnya tentang hari penyesalan iaitu hari diselesaikan perbicaraan perkara masing-masing pada masa mereka (yang ingkar) di dunia ini berada dalam kelalaian serta mereka pula tidak mahu beriman.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَرِثُ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا وَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nahnu narithu alarda waman AAalayha wailayna yurjaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.
translations.en_yusufali: It is We Who will inherit the earth, and all beings thereon: to Us will they all be returned.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kamilah yang mewarisi bumi dan segala makhluk yang ada di atasnya; dan kepada Kamilah mereka akan dikembalikan.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Waothkur fee alkitabi ibraheema innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And mention in the Book [the story of] Abraham. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.
translations.en_yusufali: (Also mention in the Book (the story of) Abraham: He was a man of Truth, a prophet.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bacakanlah (wahai Muhammad) di dalam Kitab (Al-Quran) ini perihal Nabi Ibrahim; sesungguhnya adalah ia seorang yang amat benar, lagi menjadi Nabi.

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لِمَ تَعْبُدُ مَا لَا يَسْمَعُ وَلَا يُبْصِرُ وَلَا يُغْنِى عَنكَ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Ith qala liabeehi ya abati lima taAAbudu ma la yasmaAAu wala yubsiru wala yughnee AAanka shayan

translations.en_sahih: [Mention] when he said to his father, "O my father, why do you worship that which does not hear and does not see and will not benefit you at all?
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, he said to his father: "O my father! why worship that which heareth not and seeth not, and can profit thee nothing?
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika ia berkata kepada bapanya:" Wahai ayahku, mengapa ayah menyembah benda yang tidak mendengar dan tidak melihat serta tidak dapat menolongmu sedikitpun?

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٰطًا سَوِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya abati innee qad jaanee mina alAAilmi ma lam yatika faittabiAAnee ahdika siratan sawiyyan

translations.en_sahih: O my father, indeed there has come to me of knowledge that which has not come to you, so follow me; I will guide you to an even path.
translations.en_yusufali: "O my father! to me hath come knowledge which hath not reached thee: so follow me: I will guide thee to a way that is even and straight.
translations.ms_basmeih: " Wahai ayahku, sesungguhnya telah datang kepadaku dari ilmu pengetahuan yang tidak pernah datang kepadamu oleh itu ikutlah daku; aku akan memimpinmu ke jalan yang betul.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَصِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya abati la taAAbudi alshshaytana inna alshshaytana kana lilrrahmani AAasiyyan

translations.en_sahih: O my father, do not worship Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.
translations.en_yusufali: "O my father! serve not Satan: for Satan is a rebel against (Allah) Most Gracious.
translations.ms_basmeih: " Wahai ayahku, janganlah ayah menyembah Syaitan, sesungguhnya Syaitan itu adalah menderhaka kepada Allah yang melimpah-limpah rahmatNya.

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يَمَسَّكَ عَذَابٌ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ فَتَكُونَ لِلشَّيْطَـٰنِ وَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Ya abati innee akhafu an yamassaka AAathabun mina alrrahmani fatakoona lilshshyatani waliyyan

translations.en_sahih: O my father, indeed I fear that there will touch you a punishment from the Most Merciful so you would be to Satan a companion [in Hellfire]."
translations.en_yusufali: "O my father! I fear lest a Penalty afflict thee from (Allah) Most Gracious, so that thou become to Satan a friend."
translations.ms_basmeih: " Wahai ayahku, sesungguhnya aku bimbang bahawa ayah akan kena azab dari (Allah) Ar-Rahman disebabkan ayah menyembah yang lainnya; maka dengan sebab itu akan menjadilah ayah rakan bagi Syaitan di dalam neraka".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ أَرَاغِبٌ أَنتَ عَنْ ءَالِهَتِى يَـٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ لَأَرْجُمَنَّكَ ۖ وَٱهْجُرْنِى مَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala araghibun anta AAan alihatee ya ibraheemu lain lam tantahi laarjumannaka waohjurnee maliyyan

translations.en_sahih: [His father] said, "Have you no desire for my gods, O Abraham? If you do not desist, I will surely stone you, so avoid me a prolonged time."
translations.en_yusufali: (The father) replied: "Dost thou hate my gods, O Abraham? If thou forbear not, I will indeed stone thee: Now get away from me for a good long while!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bapanya) menjawab: "Patutkah engkau bencikan tuhan-tuhanku, wahai Ibrahim? Demi sesungguhnya jika engkau tidak berhenti daripada menyeru dan menasihati daku sudah tentu aku akan meluntarmu dengan batu; dan (ingatlah lebih baik) engkau tinggalkan daku sepanjang masa".

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْكَ ۖ سَأَسْتَغْفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّىٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ بِى حَفِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala salamun AAalayka saastaghfiru laka rabbee innahu kana bee hafiyyan

translations.en_sahih: [Abraham] said, "Peace will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.
translations.en_yusufali: Abraham said: "Peace be on thee: I will pray to my Lord for thy forgiveness: for He is to me Most Gracious.
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Ibrahim berkata: " Selamat tinggalah ayah; aku akan memohon kepada Tuhanku mengampuni dosamu; sesungguhnya Ia sentiasa melimpahkan kemurahan ihsanNya kepadaku.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: WaaAAtazilukum wama tadAAoona min dooni Allahi waadAAoo rabbee AAasa alla akoona biduAAai rabbee shaqiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allah and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy."
translations.en_yusufali: "And I will turn away from you (all) and from those whom ye invoke besides Allah: I will call on my Lord: perhaps, by my prayer to my Lord, I shall be not unblest."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan aku akan membawa diri meninggalkan kamu semua serta apa yang kamu sembah yang lain dari Allah; dan aku akan beribadat kepada Tuhanku dengan ikhlas; mudah-mudahan aku dengan ibadatku kepada Tuhanku itu tidak menjadi hampa (dan derhaka seperti kamu)".

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمَّا ٱعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Falamma iAAtazalahum wama yaAAbudoona min dooni Allahi wahabna lahu ishaqa wayaAAqooba wakullan jaAAalna nabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allah, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.
translations.en_yusufali: When he had turned away from them and from those whom they worshipped besides Allah, We bestowed on him Isaac and Jacob, and each one of them We made a prophet.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka apabila ia berhijrah meninggalkan mereka dan apa yang mereka sembah yang lain dari Allah kami kurniakan kepadanya: Ishak (anaknya), dan Yaakub (cucunya); dan kedua-duanya Kami jadikan berpangkat Nabi.

ayahs.arabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wawahabna lahum min rahmatina wajaAAalna lahum lisana sidqin AAaliyyan

translations.en_sahih: And We gave them of Our mercy, and we made for them a reputation of high honor.
translations.en_yusufali: And We bestowed of Our Mercy on them, and We granted them lofty honour on the tongue of truth.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami kurniakan kepada mereka dari rahmat Kami, dan Kami jadikan bagi mereka sebutan dan pujian yang tinggi dalam kalangan umat manusia.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Waothkur fee alkitabi moosa innahu kana mukhlasan wakana rasoolan nabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
translations.en_yusufali: Also mention in the Book (the story of) Moses: for he was specially chosen, and he was a messenger (and) a prophet.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bacakanlah (wahai Muhammad) di dalam Kitab (Al-Quran) ini perihal Nabi Musa; sesungguhnya ia adalah orang pilihan, dan adalah ia seorang Rasul, lagi Nabi.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَـٰدَيْنَـٰهُ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنَـٰهُ نَجِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wanadaynahu min janibi alttoori alaymani waqarrabnahu najiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And We called him from the side of the mount at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him].
translations.en_yusufali: And we called him from the right side of Mount (Sinai), and made him draw near to Us, for mystic (converse).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah menyerunya dari arah sebelah kanan Gunung Tursina, dan Kami dampingkan dia dengan diberi penghormatan berkata dengan Kami.

ayahs.arabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَآ أَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ نَبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wawahabna lahu min rahmatina akhahu haroona nabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet.
translations.en_yusufali: And, out of Our Mercy, We gave him his brother Aaron, (also) a prophet.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami kurniakan kepadanya dari rahmat Kami, saudaranya: Harun, yang juga berpangkat Nabi.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِسْمَـٰعِيلَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Waothkur fee alkitabi ismaAAeela innahu kana sadiqa alwaAAdi wakana rasoolan nabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
translations.en_yusufali: Also mention in the Book (the story of) Isma'il: He was (strictly) true to what he promised, and he was a messenger (and) a prophet.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bacakanlah (wahai Muhammad) di dalam Kitab (Al-Quran) ini perihal Nabi Ismail; sesungguhnya ia adalah benar menepati janji dan adalah ia seorang Rasul, lagi berpangkat Nabi.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرْضِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakana yamuru ahlahu bialssalati waalzzakati wakana AAinda rabbihi mardiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakah and was to his Lord pleasing.
translations.en_yusufali: He used to enjoin on his people Prayer and Charity, and he was most acceptable in the sight of his Lord.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan adalah ia menyuruh keluarganya mengerjakan sembahyang dan memberi zakat, dan ia pula adalah seorang yang diredhai di sisi Tuhannya!

ayahs.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِدْرِيسَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Waothkur fee alkitabi idreesa innahu kana siddeeqan nabiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.
translations.en_yusufali: Also mention in the Book the case of Idris: He was a man of truth (and sincerity), (and) a prophet:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bacakanlah (wahai Muhammad) di dalam Kitab (Al-Quran) ini perihal Nabi Idris; sesungguhnya adalah ia amat benar (tutur katanya dan imannya), serta ia seorang Nabi.

ayahs.arabic: وَرَفَعْنَـٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: WarafaAAnahu makanan AAaliyyan

translations.en_sahih: And We raised him to a high station.
translations.en_yusufali: And We raised him to a lofty station.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami telah mengangkatnya ke tempat yang tinggi darjatnya.

ayahs.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلنَّبِيِّـۧنَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ ءَادَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَٱجْتَبَيْنَآ ۚ إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ خَرُّوا۟ سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا ۩
ayahs.transliteration: Olaika allatheena anAAama Allahu AAalayhim mina alnnabiyyeena min thurriyyati adama wamimman hamalna maAAa noohin wamin thurriyyati ibraheema waisraeela wamimman hadayna waijtabayna itha tutla AAalayhim ayatu alrrahmani kharroo sujjadan wabukiyyan

translations.en_sahih: Those were the ones upon whom Allah bestowed favor from among the prophets of the descendants of Adam and of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah, and of the descendants of Abraham and Israel, and of those whom We guided and chose. When the verses of the Most Merciful were recited to them, they fell in prostration and weeping.
translations.en_yusufali: Those were some of the prophets on whom Allah did bestow His Grace,- of the posterity of Adam, and of those who We carried (in the Ark) with Noah, and of the posterity of Abraham and Israel of those whom We guided and chose. Whenever the Signs of (Allah) Most Gracious were rehearsed to them, they would fall down in prostrate adoration and in tears.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka itulah sebahagian dari Nabi-nabi yang telah dikurniakan Allah nikmat yang melimpah-limpah kepada mereka dari keturunan Nabi Adam, dan dari keturunan orang-orang yang Kami bawa (dalam bahtera) bersama-sama Nabi Nuh, dan dari keturunan Nabi Ibrahim, dan (dari keturunan) Israil- dan mereka itu adalah dari orang-orang yang Kami beri hidayah petunjuk dan Kami pilih. Apabila dibacakan kepada mereka ayat-ayat (Allah) Ar-Rahman, mereka segera sujud serta menangis.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ خَلْفٌ أَضَاعُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ ٱلشَّهَوَٰتِ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَلْقَوْنَ غَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fakhalafa min baAAdihim khalfun adaAAoo alssalata waittabaAAoo alshshahawati fasawfa yalqawna ghayyan

translations.en_sahih: But there came after them successors who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil -
translations.en_yusufali: But after them there followed a posterity who missed prayers and followed after lusts soon, then, will they face Destruction,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian mereka digantikan oleh keturunan-keturunan yang mencuaikan sembahyang serta menurut hawa nafsu (dengan melakukan maksiat); maka mereka akan menghadapi azab (dalam neraka),

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظْلَمُونَ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Illa man taba waamana waAAamila salihan faolaika yadkhuloona aljannata wala yuthlamoona shayan

translations.en_sahih: Except those who repent, believe and do righteousness; for those will enter Paradise and will not be wronged at all.
translations.en_yusufali: Except those who repent and believe, and work righteousness: for these will enter the Garden and will not be wronged in the least,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali orang-orang yang bertaubat dan beriman serta beramal soleh, maka mereka itu akan masuk Syurga, dan mereka pula tidak dikurangkan pahala sedikitpun, -

ayahs.arabic: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ٱلَّتِى وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ عِبَادَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَأْتِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Jannati AAadnin allatee waAAada alrrahmanu AAibadahu bialghaybi innahu kana waAAduhu matiyyan

translations.en_sahih: [Therein are] gardens of perpetual residence which the Most Merciful has promised His servants in the unseen. Indeed, His promise has ever been coming.
translations.en_yusufali: Gardens of Eternity, those which (Allah) Most Gracious has promised to His servants in the Unseen: for His promise must (necessarily) come to pass.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) Syurga " Adn " yang telah dijanjikan oleh (Allah) Ar-Rahman kepada hamba-hambaNya disebabkan kepercayaan mereka akan perkara-perkara yang ghaib; sesungguhnya Tuhan itu, janjiNya tetap berlaku.

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا إِلَّا سَلَـٰمًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ رِزْقُهُمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan illa salaman walahum rizquhum feeha bukratan waAAashiyyan

translations.en_sahih: They will not hear therein any ill speech - only [greetings of] peace - and they will have their provision therein, morning and afternoon.
translations.en_yusufali: They will not there hear any vain discourse, but only salutations of Peace: And they will have therein their sustenance, morning and evening.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak akan mendengar di dalamnya perkataan yang sia-sia tetapi mereka sentiasa mendengar perkataan yang baik-baik; dan makan minum untuk mereka disediakan di dalamnya, pagi dan petang (sepanjang masa).

ayahs.arabic: تِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِى نُورِثُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا مَن كَانَ تَقِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Tilka aljannatu allatee noorithu min AAibadina man kana taqiyyan

translations.en_sahih: That is Paradise, which We give as inheritance to those of Our servants who were fearing of Allah.
translations.en_yusufali: Such is the Garden which We give as an inheritance to those of Our servants who guard against Evil.
translations.ms_basmeih: Itulah taman Syurga yang Kami akan berikan sebagai warisan pusaka kepada orang-orang. yang bertaqwa dari hamba-hamba Kami.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلَّا بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ ۖ لَهُۥ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِينَا وَمَا خَلْفَنَا وَمَا بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ ۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wama natanazzalu illa biamri rabbika lahu ma bayna aydeena wama khalfana wama bayna thalika wama kana rabbuka nasiyyan

translations.en_sahih: [Gabriel said], "And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful -
translations.en_yusufali: (The angels say:) "We descend not but by command of thy Lord: to Him belongeth what is before us and what is behind us, and what is between: and thy Lord never doth forget,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (berkatalah malaikat): "Kami tidak turun dari semasa ke semasa melainkan dengan perintah Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad); Dia lah jua yang menguasai serta mentadbirkan apa yang di hadapan kita dan apa yang di belakang kita serta apa yang di antara itu; dan tiadalah Tuhanmu itu lupa, -

ayahs.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبَـٰدَتِهِۦ ۚ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbu alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma faoAAbudhu waistabir liAAibadatihi hal taAAlamu lahu samiyyan

translations.en_sahih: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?"
translations.en_yusufali: "Lord of the heavens and of the earth, and of all that is between them; so worship Him, and be constant and patient in His worship: knowest thou of any who is worthy of the same Name as He?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Tuhan yang mencipta dan mentadbirkan langit dan bumi serta segala yang ada di antara keduanya; oleh itu, sembahlah engkau akan Dia dan bersabarlah dengan tekun tetap dalam beribadat kepadaNya; adakah engkau mengetahui sesiapapun yang senama dan sebanding denganNya?"

ayahs.arabic: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayaqoolu alinsanu aitha ma mittu lasawfa okhraju hayyan

translations.en_sahih: And the disbeliever says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"
translations.en_yusufali: Man says: "What! When I am dead, shall I then be raised up alive?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan manusia (yang kafir) berkata: "Apa! Apabila aku mati, adakah aku akan dibangkitkan hidup semula?"

ayahs.arabic: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْـًٔا
ayahs.transliteration: Awala yathkuru alinsanu anna khalaqnahu min qablu walam yaku shayan

translations.en_sahih: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?
translations.en_yusufali: But does not man call to mind that We created him before out of nothing?
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah manusia itu berkata demikian dan tidak memikirkan bahawa Kami telah menciptakan dia dahulu sedang ia pada masa itu belum ada sebarang apapun?

ayahs.arabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fawarabbika lanahshurannahum waalshshayateena thumma lanuhdirannahum hawla jahannama jithiyyan

translations.en_sahih: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.
translations.en_yusufali: So, by thy Lord, without doubt, We shall gather them together, and (also) the Evil Ones (with them); then shall We bring them forth on their knees round about Hell;
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, demi Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad)! Sesungguhnya Kami akan himpunkan mereka yang kafir itu beserta syaitan-syaitan di Padang Mahsyar, kemudian Kami akan bawa mereka duduk berlutut di keliling neraka Jahannam.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمْ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عِتِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma lananziAAanna min kulli sheeAAatin ayyuhum ashaddu AAala alrrahmani AAitiyyan

translations.en_sahih: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.
translations.en_yusufali: Then shall We certainly drag out from every sect all those who were worst in obstinate rebellion against (Allah) Most Gracious.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesudah itu, sesungguhnya kami akan cabut dari tiap-tiap golongan, mana-mana orang yang sangat derhaka kepada (Allah) Ar-Rahman, di antara mereka.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma lanahnu aAAlamu biallatheena hum awla biha siliyyan

translations.en_sahih: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.
translations.en_yusufali: And certainly We know best those who are most worthy of being burned therein.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian, sesungguhnya Kami lebih mengetahui akan orang-orang yang lebih patut diseksa dan dibakar dangan api neraka itu.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن مِّنكُمْ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَا ۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتْمًا مَّقْضِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wain minkum illa wariduha kana AAala rabbika hatman maqdiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And there is none of you except he will come to it. This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed.
translations.en_yusufali: Not one of you but will pass over it: this is, with thy Lord, a Decree which must be accomplished.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiada seorangpun di antara kamu melainkan akan sampai kepadanya; (yang demikian) adalah satu perkara yang mesti (berlaku) yang telah ditetapkan oleh Tuhanmu.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوا۟ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma nunajjee allatheena ittaqaw wanatharu alththalimeena feeha jithiyyan

translations.en_sahih: Then We will save those who feared Allah and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.
translations.en_yusufali: But We shall save those who guarded against evil, and We shall leave the wrong-doers therein, (humbled) to their knees.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian Kami akan selamatkan orang-orang yang bertaqwa, dan kami akan biarkan orang-orang yang zalim (dengan kekufurannya dan maksiatnya) tinggal berlutut di dalam neraka itu.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتُنَا بَيِّنَـٰتٍ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَىُّ ٱلْفَرِيقَيْنِ خَيْرٌ مَّقَامًا وَأَحْسَنُ نَدِيًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Waitha tutla AAalayhim ayatuna bayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lillatheena amanoo ayyu alfareeqayni khayrun maqaman waahsanu nadiyyan

translations.en_sahih: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Which of [our] two parties is best in position and best in association?"
translations.en_yusufali: When Our Clear Signs are rehearsed to them, the Unbelievers say to those who believe, "Which of the two sides is best in point of position? Which makes the best show in council?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila dibacakan kepada mereka ayat-ayat Kami yang jelas nyata, berkatalah orang-orang yang kafir kepada orang-orang yang beriman: "Puak yang manakah (dari kami dan kamu) yang lebih baik tempat tinggalnya dan lebih elok majlis perhimpunannya?

ayahs.arabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَحْسَنُ أَثَـٰثًا وَرِءْيًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ahsanu athathan wariyan

translations.en_sahih: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance?
translations.en_yusufali: But how many (countless) generations before them have we destroyed, who were even better in equipment and in glitter to the eye?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berapa banyak kaum-kaum (yang ingkar) sebelum mereka, kami telah binasakan, sedang mereka lebih elok alat-alat kesenangannya dan lebih elok keadaannya pada pandangan mata.

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلضَّلَـٰلَةِ فَلْيَمْدُدْ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ مَدًّا ۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا ٱلسَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضْعَفُ جُندًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul man kana fee alddalalati falyamdud lahu alrrahmanu maddan hatta itha raaw ma yooAAadoona imma alAAathaba waimma alssaAAata fasayaAAlamoona man huwa sharrun makanan waadAAafu jundan

translations.en_sahih: Say, "Whoever is in error - let the Most Merciful extend for him an extension [in wealth and time] until, when they see that which they were promised - either punishment [in this world] or the Hour [of resurrection] - they will come to know who is worst in position and weaker in soldiers."
translations.en_yusufali: Say: "If any men go astray, (Allah) Most Gracious extends (the rope) to them, until, when they see the warning of Allah (being fulfilled) - either in punishment or in (the approach of) the Hour,- they will at length realise who is worst in position, and (who) weakest in forces!
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Sesiapa yang berada di dalam kesesatan, maka biarlah (Allah) Ar-Rahman melanjutkan baginya satu tempoh yang tertentu, hingga apabila mereka melihat apa yang dijanjikan kepada mereka, - sama ada azab sengsara dunia ataupun azab kiamat, maka (pada saat itu) mereka akan mengetahui siapakah orangnya yang lebih buruk kedudukannya dan lebih lemah penyokong-penyokongnya."

ayahs.arabic: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهْتَدَوْا۟ هُدًى ۗ وَٱلْبَـٰقِيَـٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتُ خَيْرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَخَيْرٌ مَّرَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayazeedu Allahu allatheena ihtadaw hudan waalbaqiyatu alssalihatu khayrun AAinda rabbika thawaban wakhayrun maraddan

translations.en_sahih: And Allah increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse.
translations.en_yusufali: "And Allah doth advance in guidance those who seek guidance: and the things that endure, Good Deeds, are best in the sight of thy Lord, as rewards, and best in respect of (their) eventual return."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Allah akan menambahi hidayah petunjuk bagi orang-orang yang menurut jalan petunjuk; dan amal-amal yang baik yang tetap kekal faedah-faedahnya itu, lebih baik balasan pahalanya di sisi Tuhanmu dan lebih baik kesudahannya.

ayahs.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى كَفَرَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَوَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Afaraayta allathee kafara biayatina waqala laootayanna malan wawaladan

translations.en_sahih: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]?"
translations.en_yusufali: Hast thou then seen the (sort of) man who rejects Our Signs, yet says: "I shall certainly be given wealth and children?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka tidakkah engkau merasa hairan memikirkan (wahai Muhammad), akan orang yang kufur ingkar kepada ayat-ayat keterangan Kami serta ia berkata: "Demi sesungguhnya aku akan diberikan harta kekayaan dan anak-pinak pada hari akhirat?"

ayahs.arabic: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلْغَيْبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: AttalaAAa alghayba ami ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan

translations.en_sahih: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise?
translations.en_yusufali: Has he penetrated to the Unseen, or has he taken a contract with (Allah) Most Gracious?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah ia telah mengetahui akan perkara yang ghaib, atau adakah ia telah membuat perjanjian dengan (Allah) Ar-Rahman mengenainya?

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّا ۚ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ مَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla sanaktubu ma yaqoolu wanamuddu lahu mina alAAathabi maddan

translations.en_sahih: No! We will record what he says and extend for him from the punishment extensively.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay! We shall record what he says, and We shall add and add to his punishment.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak sekali-kali! Kami akan menulis apa yang dikatakannya, dan Kami akan tambahi baginya dari azab seksa, berganda-ganda.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wanarithuhu ma yaqoolu wayateena fardan

translations.en_sahih: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone.
translations.en_yusufali: To Us shall return all that he talks of and he shall appear before Us bare and alone.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami akan warisi (harta benda dan anak-pinak) yang dikatakannya itu, dan ia akan datang kepada kami dengan seorang diri.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لِّيَكُونُوا۟ لَهُمْ عِزًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Waittakhathoo min dooni Allahi alihatan liyakoonoo lahum AAizzan

translations.en_sahih: And they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.
translations.en_yusufali: And they have taken (for worship) gods other than Allah, to give them power and glory!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang kafir menyembah benda-benda yang lain dari Allah sebagai tuhan-tuhan, supaya benda-benda yang mereka sembah itu menjadi penolong-penolong yang memberi kemuliaan dan pengaruh kepada mereka.

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّا ۚ سَيَكْفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضِدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla sayakfuroona biAAibadatihim wayakoonoona AAalayhim diddan

translations.en_sahih: No! Those "gods" will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents [on the Day of Judgement].
translations.en_yusufali: Instead, they shall reject their worship, and become adversaries against them.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak sekali-kali! Bahkan benda-benda yang mereka pertuhankan itu mengingkari perbuatan mereka menyembahnya, dan akan menjadi musuh yang membawa kehinaan kepada mereka.

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمْ أَزًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara anna arsalna alshshayateena AAala alkafireena taozzuhum azzan

translations.en_sahih: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them to [evil] with [constant] incitement?
translations.en_yusufali: Seest thou not that We have set the Evil Ones on against the unbelievers, to incite them with fury?
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidakkah engkau mengetahui (Wahai Muhammad) bahawa Kami telah menghantarkan Syaitan-syaitan kepada orang-orang kafir, untuk menggalakkan mereka mengerjakan perbuatan kufur dan maksiat dengan bersungguh-sungguh?

ayahs.arabic: فَلَا تَعْجَلْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمْ عَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fala taAAjal AAalayhim innama naAAuddu lahum AAaddan

translations.en_sahih: So be not impatient over them. We only count out to them a [limited] number.
translations.en_yusufali: So make no haste against them, for We but count out to them a (limited) number (of days).
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, janganlah engkau segera marah terhadap mereka yang ingkar itu, kerana sesungguhnya kami hanya menghitung hari yang sedikit sahaja bilangannya untuk mereka.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَفْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma nahshuru almuttaqeena ila alrrahmani wafdan

translations.en_sahih: On the Day We will gather the righteous to the Most Merciful as a delegation
translations.en_yusufali: The day We shall gather the righteous to (Allah) Most Gracious, like a band presented before a king for honours,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ingatlah) hari Kami himpunkan orang-orang yang bertaqwa untuk mengadap (Allah) Ar-Rahman, dengan berpasuk-pasukan.

ayahs.arabic: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wanasooqu almujrimeena ila jahannama wirdan

translations.en_sahih: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst
translations.en_yusufali: And We shall drive the sinners to Hell, like thirsty cattle driven down to water,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami akan menghalau orang-orang yang bersalah ke neraka Jahannam, dalam keadaan dahaga.

ayahs.arabic: لَّا يَمْلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: La yamlikoona alshshafaAAata illa mani ittakhatha AAinda alrrahmani AAahdan

translations.en_sahih: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant.
translations.en_yusufali: None shall have the power of intercession, but such a one as has received permission (or promise) from (Allah) Most Gracious.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak berhak mendapat dan memberi syafaat, kecuali orang yang telah mengikat perjanjian (dengan iman dan amal yang soleh) di sisi Allah yang melimpah-limpah rahmatNya!.

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo ittakhatha alrrahmanu waladan

translations.en_sahih: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son."
translations.en_yusufali: They say: "(Allah) Most Gracious has begotten a son!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang kafir berkata: "(Allah) Ar-Rahman, mempunyai anak."

ayahs.arabic: لَّقَدْ جِئْتُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad jitum shayan iddan

translations.en_sahih: You have done an atrocious thing.
translations.en_yusufali: Indeed ye have put forth a thing most monstrous!
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi sesungguhnya, kamu telah melakukan satu perkara yang besar salahnya!

ayahs.arabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلْجِبَالُ هَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Takadu alssamawatu yatafattarna minhu watanshaqqu alardu watakhirru aljibalu haddan

translations.en_sahih: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation
translations.en_yusufali: At it the skies are ready to burst, the earth to split asunder, and the mountains to fall down in utter ruin,
translations.ms_basmeih: Langit nyaris-nyaris pecah disebabkan (anggapan mereka) yang demikian, dan bumi pula nyaris-nyaris terbelah, serta gunung-ganang pun nyaris-nyaris runtuh ranap, -

ayahs.arabic: أَن دَعَوْا۟ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: An daAAaw lilrrahmani waladan

translations.en_sahih: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son.
translations.en_yusufali: That they should invoke a son for (Allah) Most Gracious.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kerana mereka mendakwa mengatakan: (Allah) Ar-Rahman mempunyai anak.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wama yanbaghee lilrrahmani an yattakhitha waladan

translations.en_sahih: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.
translations.en_yusufali: For it is not consonant with the majesty of (Allah) Most Gracious that He should beget a son.
translations.ms_basmeih: Padahal tiadalah layak bagi (Allah) Ar-Rahman, bahawa Ia mempunyai anak.

ayahs.arabic: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَبْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: In kullu man fee alssamawati waalardi illa atee alrrahmani AAabdan

translations.en_sahih: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.
translations.en_yusufali: Not one of the beings in the heavens and the earth but must come to (Allah) Most Gracious as a servant.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak ada sesiapapun di langit dan di bumi melainkan ia akan datang kepada (Allah) Ar-Rahman, sebagai hamba.

ayahs.arabic: لَّقَدْ أَحْصَىٰهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad ahsahum waAAaddahum AAaddan

translations.en_sahih: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting.
translations.en_yusufali: He does take an account of them (all), and hath numbered them (all) exactly.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi sesungguhnya! Allah telah mengira mereka (dengan pengetahuanNya) serta menghitung mereka satu persatu.

ayahs.arabic: وَكُلُّهُمْ ءَاتِيهِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ فَرْدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakulluhum ateehi yawma alqiyamati fardan

translations.en_sahih: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone.
translations.en_yusufali: And everyone of them will come to Him singly on the Day of Judgment.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka masing-masing akan datang mengadapNya pada hari kiamat dengan seorang diri.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وُدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Inna allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati sayajAAalu lahumu alrrahmanu wuddan

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.
translations.en_yusufali: On those who believe and work deeds of righteousness, will (Allah) Most Gracious bestow love.
translations.ms_basmeih: . Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal soleh, Allah yang melimpah-limpah rahmatnya akan menanamkan bagi mereka dalam hati orang ramai perasaan kasih sayang.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Fainnama yassarnahu bilisanika litubashshira bihi almuttaqeena watunthira bihi qawman luddan

translations.en_sahih: So, [O Muhammad], We have only made Qur'an easy in the Arabic language that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.
translations.en_yusufali: So have We made the (Qur'an) easy in thine own tongue, that with it thou mayest give Glad Tidings to the righteous, and warnings to people given to contention.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesungguhnya Kami memudahkan turunnya Al-Quran ini dengan bahasamu (wahai Muhammad), ialah supaya engkau memberi khabar gembira dengannya kepada orang-orang yang bertaqwa, dan supaya engkau memberi amaran dengannya kepada kaum yang degil dalam kekufurannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هَلْ تُحِسُّ مِنْهُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ أَوْ تَسْمَعُ لَهُمْ رِكْزًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hal tuhissu minhum min ahadin aw tasmaAAu lahum rikzan

translations.en_sahih: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound?
translations.en_yusufali: But how many (countless) generations before them have We destroyed? Canst thou find a single one of them (now) or hear (so much as) a whisper of them?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan amatlah banyaknya kaum-kaum kafir yang Kami telah binasakan sebelum mereka; engkau tidak menyedari ataupun mendengar suara yang sayup bagi seseorangpun dari orang-orang yang telah dibinasakan itu.
